title: Ham & Cheese Sandwich
description: Adds a Ham & Cheese sandwich to Minecraft.
body:
# Ham & Cheese Sandwich

Have you been craving ham & cheese sandwiches all day? Well this mod is for you!

This mod adds:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Ham & Cheese Sandwich**

</details>

## Here is what you need to know.

First of all you need to make cheese:

![Crafting Recipe For Cheese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d09a5691fa288a53d2463d2d5b4baa7b7f11368.png)

To get a **Ham & Cheese Sandwich** you need to craft it like this:

![Crafting Recipe For Sandwich](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc9ce7d819f7f8e8a3b6fc95bb2bc7d434414c1e.png)

Once you have it you can eat it, or just keep it.

## Stats
**7** Nutrition **0.8** Saturation
